text: Auth migration is blocked on a token-refresh race condition; waiting on infra to bump the Redis session TTL before we can roll to prod.
Confirmed the OAuth callback works in staging. Prod rollout is gated on the Redis TTL fix from infra.
Spiked moving session storage to Redis; PR is open and needs review from the platform team.
Synced with infra on the Redis TTL bump; they will ship it Friday, which unblocks the auth migration.
